ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the school type */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the school */,
  "school_size" INTEGER /* Reference to the school size */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the educational district */,
  "charter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the charter organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the school */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the school */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last enrollment update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_charter_id FOREIGN KEY ("charter_id") REFERENCES charters ("charter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type FOREIGN KEY ("school_type") REFERENCES school_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_size FOREIGN KEY ("school_size") REFERENCES school_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for financial data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "per_student_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated per student */,
  "total_school_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "spending_range" INTEGER /* Reference to the spending range */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year for the financial data */,
  "budget_allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget was allocated */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding */,
  "total_expenditures" REAL /* Total expenditures of the school */,
  "expenditure_categories" TEXT /* Categories of expenditures */,
  "fiscal_quarter" TEXT /* Fiscal quarter for the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_spending_range FOREIGN KEY ("spending_range") REFERENCES spending_ranges ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for performance data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "average_math_score" REAL /* Average math score of students */,
  "average_reading_score" REAL /* Average reading score of students */,
  "passing_rate_math" REAL /* Percentage of students passing math */,
  "passing_rate_reading" REAL /* Percentage of students passing reading */,
  "overall_passing_rate" REAL /* Overall passing rate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year for the performance data */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance data was recorded */,
  "performance_category" TEXT /* Category of performance */,
  "performance_grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level for which the performance is recorded */,
  "performance_subject" TEXT /* Specific subject for which the performance is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  "funding_model" TEXT /* Funding model associated with the school type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the school size category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school size category */,
  "student_range" TEXT /* Range of students that define the size category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spending_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spending range */,
  "range_name" TEXT /* Name of the spending range */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spending range */,
  "range_limits" TEXT /* Specific limits of the spending range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the student attends */,
  "math_score" REAL /* Math score of the student */,
  "reading_score" REAL /* Reading score of the student */,
  "passing_math" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student passed math */,
  "passing_reading" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student passed reading */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "dropout_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student dropped out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school where the teacher works */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject taught by the teacher */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level the teacher teaches */,
  "certification_status" TEXT /* Certification status of the teacher */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of teaching experience */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the administrator is responsible for */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level the administrator is responsible for */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of administrative experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_admins_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational district */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the district */,
  "total_schools" INTEGER /* Total number of schools in the district */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the district */,
  "funding_per_student" REAL /* Average funding per student in the district */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charters" (
  "charter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charter school */,
  "charter_name" TEXT /* Name of the charter school */,
  "sponsor_info" TEXT /* Information about the charter's sponsor */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the charter school */,
  "funding_per_student" REAL /* Average funding per student in the charter school */,
  "charter_agreement" TEXT /* Details of the charter agreement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charter_id")
)
